titleStmt.title: SII 26.738: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 738. (A.R. No. 687 of 1909.) TIRUNEḌUṄGAḶAM, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: West wall of the same shrine.

It records that a certain Mōśiyan Oṟṟiyūraṉ of Tiruvāṉaikkāval, a dēvadānam in Viḷā-nāḍu endowed two fields called Kūttan-mayakkal and Kuñjiramali-vayakkal out of the yield of which are to be fed 350 Śivayōgis, at the rate of 25 Śivayōgis a day during the 7-day festival held in the month of Māśi and a same number of Śivayōgis at the same rate during the 7-day festival held in the month of Chittirai. It is stated that a kuṟuṇi (i.e., 1 marakkāl) of paddy was provided for each Śivayōgi and the total quantity required to feed the Śivayōgis came to 30 kalam which is to be measured out by the measure called Kōdukulavan. It is stated that this endowment was accepted by the sabhai of the place who had agreed to carry out object of the gift every year.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kovirājarājakecarivanmaṟku yāṇṭu 9 Āvatu viḷānāṭṭut tevatāna brahmadeyam tiruvāṉaikkāval mociyan Oṟṟiyūraṉ kūttaṉ mayakkalum Itinoṭum vayak
kaṭainta kuñciramalivayakkalum Āka Ivviraṇṭukkum kiḻpāṟkellai kāvin kiḻaceku mekkum teṉpāṟkellai kaḷḷiccekku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai tirunantavānattukkum tevinaṅkai viṭṭu
kku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai koṭan comācan nilattukku teṟkum Ivvicaitta perunānkellaiyuḷ Akappaṭṭa nilam mā cittirai tiruviḻā Eḻu nāḷaikkum nicatam Irupattaivar civayokikaḷukku
cittirait tiruviḻā Eḻunāḷaikkum nicatam Irupattaivar civayokikaḷukkumāka Iravai tiruviḻāvukkumāka munnūṟṟaimpatu civayokikaḷukkum neyyum tayirum pāṟkum viṟakum
kuṟuvāḻ kūliyum Aṭuvānukkum Akappaṭa civayogi Oruvanukku nellu kuṟuṇi yāka van=ta nellu muppatin kalam Innellu muppatin kalamum kotukula
van Ennum marakkālāl ni(ru)cata(ta)m muṟṟattu Aṭṭi Ippaṭi Ivūr sabhai- yum māy Āṭṭāṇṭutoṟum cantrātittaval celuttuvataāka vaitten moci Oṟṟiyūran Itu panmāheśvararakṣai
Digital edition of SII 26.738 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
